case_title: CHRISTOPHER HOM VS. ALBERT CHING et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-08-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
